name: Meta (Facebook & Instagram)

specs.safe_zone: Standard center focus, but captions and 'Shop Now' bars must not overlap UI
specs.pacing: Moderate (3-5s per cut). Focus on 'Storytelling' over 'ADHD cuts'

platform_exclusive_logic.Social_Proof: Must feature 'Comment Count', 'Like Count' (visualized), or 'User Testimonials' within the creative.
platform_exclusive_logic.The_Carousel_Hook: Use Multi-card ads to show a 'Progression' or 'Choice' story (Slide to see what happens next).
platform_exclusive_logic.Aesthetic_First: Instagram requires high-end, aesthetic color grading. Facebook requires high-engagement, 'Share-worthy' content.

psychological_hooks: Community Validation: 'Join 5 million players' or 'The #1 Strategy game in your city'.
The FOMO Carousel: Each card shows a different 'Legendary Hero' with a 'Claimed' watermark on some.
Relatable Situations: Real-life scenarios (e.g., a person playing at a coffee shop) that bridge the gap between reality and game.
